metadata.description: Marketplace for the game-build-team Claude Code skill.

plugins.name: game-build-team
plugins.description: Build Godot 4 / GDScript game features with a team of AI agents — a dynamic, resumable Workflow pipeline with two unskippable gates (a rapid headless test gate and an 'is it fun' gate) that refuses to call a feature done until it's verified, capped by the Manager's thorough on-device final pass.
